moments.title: England vs Croatia in World Cup 2026
moments.blurb: England kick off their FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign today against Croatia in Arlington, USA, with a 9pm UK time kick-off.

angles.name: Match Build-up
angles.copy: It's HERE! England's World Cup journey begins tonight against Croatia. Who's got their shirt on and the snacks ready? Prediction time!

angles.name: Game On
angles.copy: Kick-off! England vs Croatia at the World Cup 2026 is LIVE. Come on, Three Lions!

moments.title: Isle of Wight Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The iconic Isle of Wight Festival begins tomorrow, running from June 18-21, featuring headliners Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, and The Cure.

source.l: Isle of Wight Festival Official Site

angles.name: Festival Excitement
angles.copy: Isle of Wight Festival kicks off tomorrow! Who are you most excited to see? Lewis Capaldi, Calvin Harris, The Cure... what a lineup!

angles.name: Packing for the Island
angles.copy: Last-minute packing for the Isle of Wight Festival? Don't forget your wellies, sunscreen, and that essential portable charger!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Starts in Glasgow
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green hosts the TRNSMT Festival from Friday, June 19 to Sunday, June 21, with headliners Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Scotland's Big Weekend
angles.copy: TRNSMT is almost here! Glasgow's ready for Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, Lewis Capaldi and more. Who's heading to Glasgow Green this weekend?

angles.name: Festival Forecast
angles.copy: Sunscreen or poncho for TRNSMT? Keep an eye on the Glasgow forecast as the festival kicks off this Friday!

moments.title: Premier League 2026/27 Fixtures Announced
moments.blurb: The full fixture list for the 2026/27 Premier League season will be officially revealed on Friday, June 19 at 10:00 BST.

angles.name: Fixture Release Day
angles.copy: Get ready, football fans! The Premier League fixtures for the 2026/27 season drop this Friday at 10 AM. Who's your team playing first?

angles.name: Derby Day Speculation
angles.copy: Which derby are you hoping to see early in the 2026/27 Premier League season? Fixtures out Friday!

moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Qualifying Begins
moments.blurb: The qualifying rounds for The Championships, Wimbledon 2026, are set to begin on Monday, June 22, ahead of the main tournament starting on June 29.

angles.name: Road to Wimbledon
angles.copy: The grass courts are calling! Wimbledon 2026 qualifying starts Monday. Who will battle their way into the main draw?

angles.name: Tennis Season Peak
angles.copy: Wimbledon season is officially underway next week with the qualifying rounds. Get ready for some epic tennis! #GrandSlam

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing on ITV2 and ITVX, having started on June 1st.

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island drama! What are your thoughts on the latest recoupling? Who's safe, who's not?

angles.name: Today's Gossip
angles.copy: Catching up on last night's Love Island? The villa is heating up! What's the biggest talking point today?

moments.title: Summer Solstice Approaches
moments.blurb: The Summer Solstice, marking the longest day and shortest night of the year in the Northern Hemisphere, occurs on Sunday, June 21st, at 9:24 AM BST.

angles.name: Longest Day
angles.copy: The Summer Solstice is this Sunday! Get ready for the longest day of the year and more daylight hours. How will you be celebrating?

angles.name: Sunrise at Stonehenge
angles.copy: Many will gather at Stonehenge for sunrise this Sunday to mark the Summer Solstice. It's a truly ancient tradition.

moments.title: Barry Manilow's 83rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary singer-songwriter Barry Manilow, known for hits like 'Mandy' and 'Copacabana', turns 83 today.

angles.name: Celebrating Barry
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Barry Manilow! What's your favourite Manilow anthem?

angles.name: Manilow Memories
angles.copy: From 'Mandy' to 'Copacabana', Barry Manilow has given us so many classics. Celebrating his 83rd birthday today!

moments.title: Kendrick Lamar's 39th Birthday
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning rapper and songwriter Kendrick Lamar, celebrated for albums like 'Good Kid, M.A.A.D City' and 'DAMN.', celebrates his 39th birthday today.

angles.name: King Kendrick
angles.copy: Happy 39th Birthday to the incredible Kendrick Lamar! What's your essential Kendrick track?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating the lyrical genius that is Kendrick Lamar on his 39th birthday today. Drop your favourite album!

moments.title: Paul McCartney's 84th Birthday
moments.blurb: Music legend Sir Paul McCartney, icon of The Beatles and Wings, turns 84 tomorrow. He continues to tour and release new music. (Note: No direct search result for 2026, but widely known birthdate)

angles.name: Happy Birthday Macca
angles.copy: Tomorrow, a true legend turns 84! Happy (early) Birthday to Sir Paul McCartney! What's your favourite Beatles or Wings track?

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the enduring genius of Paul McCartney ahead of his 84th birthday tomorrow. An incredible career!

moments.title: Lionel Richie's 77th Birthday
moments.blurb: Global superstar Lionel Richie, known for his incredible solo career and work with The Commodores, celebrates his 77th birthday on Friday. (Note: No direct search result for 2026, but widely known birthdate)

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Can you believe Lionel Richie turns 77 this Friday? Get ready to dance 'All Night Long' celebrating this icon!

angles.name: Soulful Sounds
angles.copy: From The Commodores to a phenomenal solo career, Lionel Richie's music spans generations. Happy (early) 77th birthday!

moments.title: Ariana Grande's 33rd Birthday
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Ariana Grande, known for her powerful vocals and chart-topping hits, will celebrate her 33rd birthday on June 26th. (Note: No direct search result for 2026, but widely known birthdate)

angles.name: Happy Ari Day
angles.copy: Queen of pop Ariana Grande turns 33 next week! What's your ultimate Ariana track to blast out?

angles.name: Pop Perfection
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate Ariana Grande's 33rd birthday on June 26th! Her music always hits different.
